channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 4f1e6fca-3fde-4291-961e-642def6d5e1d
Display name: Confidential Ledger Data Reader
Description: Allows read access to Confidential Ledger transactions, including reading entries, receipts, and transaction status.
Link: https://management.azure.com/4f1e6fca-3fde-4291-961e-642def6d5e1d?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 971cce9f-2680-4357-9678-c947847a9425
Display name: Defender Storage Malware Operator
Description: Grants permissions for Microsoft Defender for Storage malware scanning operations including blob/file read, index tag updates, EventGrid management, and network bypass.
Link: https://management.azure.com/971cce9f-2680-4357-9678-c947847a9425?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: c6c9b2d8-9a5e-4122-85e1-81612a046ab2
Display name: Defender Storage Automated Malware Remediation
Description: Grants additional permissions for Microsoft Defender for Storage automated remediation operations including soft-delete management and blob deletion.
Link: https://management.azure.com/c6c9b2d8-9a5e-4122-85e1-81612a046ab2?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: cd50fd1f-0421-46f2-8cce-afc587dbcc77
Display name: Defender Storage Malware Data Scanner
Description: Grants data plane permissions for Microsoft Defender for Storage scanning operations — blob/file read, index tag updates.
Link: https://management.azure.com/cd50fd1f-0421-46f2-8cce-afc587dbcc77?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: d622af9a-030e-4f32-8267-419abfd54702
Display name: Pro Active Coding Data User
Description: Allows processing of health data in Pro Active Coding
Link: https://management.azure.com/d622af9a-030e-4f32-8267-419abfd54702?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: eef9d654-743f-4e2c-ad0f-9ed243177663
Display name: Defender Azure SQL Databases
Description: Microsoft Defender for Azure SQL Databases role. Grant permissions for enablement.
Link: https://management.azure.com/eef9d654-743f-4e2c-ad0f-9ed243177663?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: f1641a58-a144-402b-baf9-39d1a4c10119
Display name: Confidential Ledger Data Contributor
Description: Allows read and write access to Confidential Ledger transactions, including reading entries, receipts, and transaction status, and creating new ledger entries.
Link: https://management.azure.com/f1641a58-a144-402b-baf9-39d1a4c10119?api-version=2022-04-01
